transcript: Speaker A: I've been learning Spanish on Duolingo, for free. ¡Me encanta la playa! [I love the beach!]
on_screen_text:
duolingo

I've been learning Spanish on Duolingo, for free.

summary: An animated bear on a beach shares that they are learning Spanish for free on Duolingo. They demonstrate their skills by saying 'I love the beach' in Spanish.
